full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19532

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19532.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
cifs-utils-devel-7.2-0.el9_6.2.i686.rpm
cifs-utils-devel-7.2-0.el9_6.2.x86_64.rpm
cifs-utils-7.2-0.el9_6.2.x86_64.rpm
pam_cifscreds-7.2-0.el9_6.2.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
cifs-utils-7.2-0.el9_6.2.aarch64.rpm
cifs-utils-devel-7.2-0.el9_6.2.aarch64.rpm
pam_cifscreds-7.2-0.el9_6.2.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/cifs-utils-7.2-0.el9_6.2.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[7.2-2]
- resolves: RHEL-80179 - Fix autorelease

[7.2-1]
- resolves: RHEL-80179 - Update to version 7.2
